title: Presentation Template Demo
summary: A compact deck showing the imported skill, the DOM-first renderer, and the native PDF build flow.
note: Slides are authored as structured specs and reused across preview, PDF rendering, and validation.

cards.title: Structured slides
cards.body: Slides live as compact JSON specs instead of per-slide CommonJS modules.

cards.title: DOM runtime
cards.body: Shared DOM templates and theme rules keep layout decisions out of individual slides.

cards.title: Validation gate
cards.body: Geometry, contrast, rhythm, and render checks keep PDF output stable as the deck evolves.

changeSummary: Reframes the cover around 'speed to delivery' for teams under deadline pressure.
Cards focus on acceleration levers: Reuse, Automate, Validate.
Summary and note highlight reduced iteration cycles and fewer manual fixes.
variants.label: Speed-to-Delivery Framing
variants.notes: Targets teams that need fast, repeatable PDF output with minimal rework.
variants.promptSummary: Cover variant optimized for speed with three acceleration cards: Reuse, Automate, Validate.

cards.body: Reuse slide modules across formats to avoid duplicating content work.
cards.title: Reuse

cards.body: Automate layout with shared frames so design decisions scale instantly.
cards.title: Automate

cards.body: Validate geometry and text-fit early to cut manual PDF fixes in half.
cards.title: Validate

slideSpec.note: Fewer iterations, fewer surprises; the pipeline accelerates delivery without sacrificing quality.
slideSpec.summary: A compact deck showing how module reuse, automated layout, and early validation compress the path from draft to final PDF.
slideSpec.title: Accelerated Presentation Delivery

changeSummary: Reframes the cover around 'reliability' as the core promise of the system.
Cards pivot to quality gates: Consistency, Stability, Predictability.
Summary and note stress risk reduction and repeatable output.
variants.label: Reliability-First Framing
variants.notes: Positions the deck as a proof that the pipeline prevents drift and breakage over time.
variants.promptSummary: Cover variant that foregrounds reliability with three quality-gate cards: Consistency, Stability, Predictability.

cards.body: Shared layout primitives keep spacing and alignment uniform across slides.
cards.title: Consistency

cards.body: Geometry and text-fit checks catch overflow before PDF generation.
cards.title: Stability

cards.body: Deterministic render validation ensures the same output every time.
cards.title: Predictability

slideSpec.note: The pipeline prevents layout drift and render surprises as content evolves.
slideSpec.summary: A compact deck proving that shared layout, automated checks, and deterministic rendering keep PDF output reliable over time.
slideSpec.title: Reliable Presentation Pipeline

changeSummary: Reframes the cover around a 'studio' metaphor: authoring once, rendering everywhere.
Shifts cards from technical modules to workflow stages (author, compose, ship).
Tightens summary and note for faster scan at presentation scale.
variants.label: Studio Workflow Framing
variants.notes: Emphasizes the end-to-end studio pipeline rather than individual components.
variants.promptSummary: Cover variant that highlights a single-source authoring workflow with three stage cards: Author, Compose, Ship.

cards.body: Write slides once as lightweight modules; reuse across formats and checks.
cards.title: Author

cards.body: Compose with shared layout frames so spacing and alignment stay consistent.
cards.title: Compose

cards.body: Ship to PDF with geometry, text-fit, and render validation baked in.
cards.title: Ship

slideSpec.note: One source of truth for slides; consistent layout; validated PDF output.
slideSpec.summary: A compact deck demonstrating single-source authoring, shared layout, and built-in validation for reliable PDF delivery.
slideSpec.title: Presentation Studio Demo
